data.content: Approved implementation review: lease audit summary and agent rows now derive totals from completed outcomes (successes + failures), queue charts show daily success-rate percentages from completed outcomes only, and helper tests cover the new completed-count and percentage behavior. Verified branch feat/foolery-d8cb-audit-page against acceptance criteria with isolated validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
